---
title: "Statistical Test Selection Table"
format:
  typst:
    papersize: presentation-16-9
    fontsize: 8pt
    margin:
      x: 1cm
      y: 1.2cm
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-align: center

library(readr)
library(tinytable)

data_wide_read <- read_csv2("test_selection_scheme_wide.csv")

data_wide_read[is.na(data_wide_read)] <- ""

tt(data_wide_read) |>
  style_tt(
    i = seq(1, nrow(data_wide_read), by = 2),
    background = "#EEEEEE"
  ) |>
  theme_tt("resize")
```
